name: Gmail Checker
description: GAS-based email checker that monitors inbox and notifies Nano via Telegram. Scheduled checks at noon and 9pm Costa Rica time, plus manual trigger.

name: Mission Control Dashboard
description: Next.js dashboard for tracking tasks (Kanban), projects, memory, docs and team. Linear-inspired design. Hosted on GitHub Pages.

name: Workspace Foundation
description: OpenClaw setup, identity configuration, GitHub repository, SOUL/USER/TOOLS/MEMORY files. The base layer for everything else.

name: Media Processing Pipeline
description: Photo (RAW) and video processing capabilities. FFmpeg for video, ImageMagick/rawpy for photos. Instagram Reel creation workflow.
